title: i18n command error hardening
objective: Route command human errors through the i18n catalog and add static protection against new hardcoded errors.
description: Completes missing i18n coverage for command errors identified by the baseline.
parallel_safe_reason: Catalog changes affect all later human command output.
must: Localize missing human command errors found by slice-00.
Keep JSON contracts and JSON keys unlocalized.
Add static or matrix coverage for hardcoded command errors with an explicit allowlist.
Test representative EN and ES error output.
not_included: Translating commands, flags, paths, provider names, model ids, or JSON keys.
Changing command behavior beyond message localization.
acceptance: Representative errors in config, evidence, spec, graph, prepare, and ai are localized.
Static i18n audit fails on non-allowlisted new hardcoded command errors.
JSON outputs remain parseable and unlocalized.
validation_hints: Suggested commands in translated messages must remain exact.
Prefer translator keys over local regex localization when feasible.
